channel.title: ops on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in ops on William Fang

item.title: Docker 运维小记
item.description: 安装 Docker 删除旧版本 sudo yum remove docker \ docker-client \ docker-client-latest \ docker-common \ docker-latest \ docker-latest-logrotate \ docker-logrotate \ docker-engine 添加软件源 sudo yum install -y yum-utils sudo yum-config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo sudo yum update 安装 sudo yum install docker.io 或者使用国内 daocloud 一键安装命令： ## daocloud curl -sSL https://get.daocloud.io/docker | sh
